name: Asta
desc: The lead researcher of Herta Space Station and a lady from a renowned family.\nShe's an astronomer overflowing with curiosity, and excels at managing the disparate staff of the space station.

1.name: Star Sings Sans Verses or Vocals
1.desc: When using Skill, deals DMG for 1 extra time to a random enemy.

2.name: Moon Speaks in Wax and Wane
2.desc: After using her Ultimate, Asta's Charging stacks will not be reduced in the next turn.

3.name: Meteor Showers for Wish and Want
3.desc: Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nTalent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.

4.name: Aurora Basks in Beauty and Bliss
4.desc: Asta's Energy Regeneration Rate increases by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> when she has <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> or more Charging stacks.

5.name: Nebula Secludes in Runes and Riddles
5.desc: Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nBasic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.

6.name: Cosmos Dreams in Calm and Comfort
6.desc: Charging stack(s) lost in each turn is reduced by <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>.

100901.name: Spectrum Beam
100901.desc: Deals Fire DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Asta's ATK to one designated enemy.
100901.simple_desc: Deals minor Fire DMG to one enemy.

100902.name: Meteor Storm
100902.desc: Deals Fire DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Asta's ATK to one designated enemy and further deals DMG for 4 extra times, with each time dealing Fire DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Asta's ATK to a random enemy.
100902.simple_desc: Deals minor Fire DMG to single enemy targets with 5 Bounces in total.

100903.name: Astral Blessing
100903.desc: Increases SPD of all allies by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color> for <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turn(s).

100904.name: Astrometry
100904.desc: Gains 1 stack of Charging for every different enemy hit by Asta plus an extra stack if the enemy hit has Fire Weakness.\nFor every stack of Charging Asta has, all allies' ATK increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[f1]%</unbreak></color>, up to <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> time(s).\nStarting from her second turn, Asta's Charging stack count is reduced by <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> at the beginning of every turn.
100904.simple_desc: The character will receive 1 stack of Charging for every different enemy they hit, for a maximum of 5 stacks. Every stack of Charging increases ATK for all allies. At the beginning of their turn, reduce Charging stacks.

100906.name: Attack
100906.desc: Attacks an enemy, and after entering combat, reduces their Toughness of the corresponding Type.

100907.name: Miracle Flash
100907.desc: Immediately attacks the enemy. After entering battle, deals Fire DMG equal to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of Asta's ATK to all enemies.
100907.simple_desc: Attacks the enemy. After entering battle, deals minor DMG to all enemies.

1.point_desc: Asta's Basic ATK has a <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> <u>base chance</u> to Burn the enemy target for <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turn(s).\nBurned enemies take Fire DoT equal to <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak> of DMG dealt by Asta's Basic ATK at the start of each turn.

30000001.name: Base Chance
30000001.desc: The base chance of applying debuffs to targets hit. \nThe final probability is affected by the attacker's Effect Hit Rate and enemy targets' Effect RES.

1.point_desc: When Asta is on the field, all allies' Fire DMG increases by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.
Asta's DEF increases by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> for every current Charging stack she possesses.
